params.name: Sputnik 1
params.source: Club Chest (1%), Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.14%)
params.description:
Up till Oct 7, 1957 AD, Sputnik 1 had been traveling in the universe for days. Sputnik, launched by the Soviet Union, was the first man-made satellite. It signaled to the Earth data on air pressure and temperature changes in the sky. After it launched, it returned a signal for three weeks, spent over three months in orbit, circled the Earth more than a thousand times, and finally re-entered Earth's atmosphere and burned up.

[Basic info]

Weight: 83.5kg. Material: Aluminum alloy. Carrying: Radar …
